Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Pltfs

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Continued To Apr-13-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff, Jai Chang, appearing in propria persona. Appearance for defendant. No appearance by plaintiff, Thomas Boland. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff, Thomas Boland's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that the claim of Thomas Boland is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. The Arbitrator's jurisdiction is extended to 3/12/2004. The OSC is re-set to 4/13/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Valerie Papale. (212)
